name: PayClaw · Agent Payments
description: Give your agent a wallet it can actually spend. USDC-native on Base L2. 1% flat take rate, no monthly fees, no KYC, no custody of your funds. Three lines of integration: the skill auto-provisions an EOA per agent on first pay(), signs and settles transactions on-chain, and exposes balance + history as sub-skills.
author: onsari

rpcUrl.description: EVM RPC URL. Defaults to Base mainnet. Override for Base Sepolia testnet: https://sepolia.base.org

usdcAddress.description: USDC contract address. Default is Base mainnet native USDC (Circle-issued).

feeRecipient.description: PayClaw treasury EOA that receives the 1% take rate per settled transaction. MUST be an externally-owned account (EOA), not a contract — the skill validates this at runtime and refuses to pay into contracts (defense against reentrancy and config-injection attacks).

recipientWhitelist.description: Optional array of 0x addresses the agent is allowed to pay. If set and non-empty, pay() rejects any recipient not in the list. Use this to mitigate prompt-injection attacks that try to redirect payments.

dailyCapUsdc.description: Per-agent per-UTC-day spending cap in USDC. pay() is rejected if today's accumulated spend + this payment would exceed the cap. Protects against keystore compromise and runaway agents. Set to 0 to disable (NOT recommended).

spendLedgerStore.description: Path template where the daily spend ledger is persisted per agent (chmod 600). {agentId} is substituted at runtime.

feeBps.description: Take rate in basis points. Default 100 bps = 1.00%. Fee is in addition to the amount transferred to the recipient.

walletStore.description: Path template where per-agent EOA keys are stored (encrypted with the agent's OpenClaw identity key). {agentId} is substituted at runtime.

paymasterUrl.description: Optional ERC-4337 paymaster URL that sponsors gas so the agent's wallet never needs ETH. Recommended for UX. If unset, the agent must hold a small ETH balance for gas.
